title: psychotria megalocalyx
intro: Psychotria megalocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar wild coffee due to its coffee-like fruit. This plant has been traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria megalocalyx include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruit of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and other remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
